name: The Wise Oak
explicitMods: During Effect, 6% reduced Damage taken of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is lowest
During Effect, Damage Penetrates 8% Resistance of each Element for which your Uncapped Elemental Resistance is highest
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: The summer sun dries the soil and burns the leaves.
The autumn rain extinguishes the flames.
The spring bloom shades the wet earth.
Nature is an eternal tug of war.

name: Badge of the Brotherhood
explicitMods: Your Maximum Frenzy Charges is equal to your Maximum Power Charges
10% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
8% increased Effect of Elusive on you per Power Charge
24% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
25% chance to lose a Power Charge when you gain Elusive
flavourText: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.

name: The Arkhon's Tools
explicitMods: +36 to Dexterity and Intelligence
12% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
Summon Skitterbots also summons a Scorching Skitterbot
Summoned Skitterbots' Auras affect you as well as Enemies
75% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments inflicted by Summoned Skitterbots
22% increased Trap and Mine Throwing Speed
flavourText: Motion, purpose... craft. The fruits of my mind laboured
to build my wildest imaginings, never tiring, never faltering.
Life... or something like it, engineered in its image.

explicitMods: 25% reduced Charges per use

Born of his brother's seed
Romira threw her a banquet
A perfidious meal indeed.

name: Foulborn Piscator's Vigil
explicitMods: No Physical Damage
12% increased Attack Speed
+376 to Accuracy Rating
Attacks with this Weapon have 105% increased Elemental Damage

flavourText: "Stone still, amidst the reeds,
breath fogging in the iron cold air.
he sits, he waits, he watches.
A piscatorial vigil, sat by the river,
his cathedral, his patience his unanswered prayer."
- Jojoba Mansell, bard, angler, adventurer

socketedItems.secDescrText: Throws a trap that damages and immobilises a single enemy for a duration based on how much damage was dealt.
